result.name: STL Batch Validator Report
result.description: Scans a directory of ASCII STL files and produces a manufacturing validation report checking manifold closure, inverted normals (winding-order), and degenerate triangles. Outputs console report and validation_report.json.

result.name: STL Batch Validator Report v2
result.description: Scans a directory of ASCII STL files matching supplier_*.stl and produces a manufacturing validation report checking manifold closure, inverted normals (winding-order cross-product), and degenerate triangles. Outputs a console report and validation_report.json. ASCII-safe output (no Unicode symbols).

result.name: Improved STL Validator
result.description: Validates ASCII STL files for manufacturing suitability: checks triangle count, surface area, manifold closure (open edges), inverted face normals, and degenerate triangles. Fixes the hidden inverted-normal bug present in stl_validator_provided.py.

result.name: Improved STL Validator (Final)
result.description: Validates ASCII STL files for manufacturing suitability: checks triangle count, surface area, manifold closure (open edges), inverted face normals via winding-order cross-product verification, and degenerate (zero-area) triangles. Fixes the hidden inverted-normal bug present in stl_validator_provided.py. All 3 test cases pass (valid mesh, inverted normals, open mesh).

result.name: Improved STL Validator v2

manifest.name: STL Batch Validator (Episode 1)
manifest.description: Validates all supplier_*.stl ASCII STL files for manufacturing suitability: checks manifold closure (open edges), inverted face normals via winding-order cross-product, and degenerate triangles. Outputs validation_report.json. Fixes hidden inverted-normal bug in stl_validator_provided.py.
